title: YouTube Thumbnail Social Media Meme Cover
sourceTitle: Youtube Thumbnail Social Media Meme Cover

imagePrompts.prompt: Draw a {argument name="platform" default="Douyin"} short video cover. Large title text fills the left half of the screen: "{argument name="title" default="I'm in the Emotion Factory AI creating meme images; laughing so hard colleagues called the police"}". On the right side, the host with an {argument name="expression" default="exaggerated close-up photo laughing to tears"}. In the bottom left, the number of likes is {argument name="likes" default="3.28 million"}. In the bottom right, the hashtags are "# AI Shenanigans # Dying of Laughter."

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

Draw a {argument name="platform" default="Douyin"} short video cover. Large title text fills the left half of the screen: "{argument name="title" default="I'm in the Emotion Factory AI creating meme images; laughing so hard colleagues called the police"}". On the right side, the host with an {argument name="expression" default="exaggerated close-up photo laughing to tears"}. In the bottom left, the number of likes is {argument name="likes" default="3.28 million"}. In the bottom right, the hashtags are "# AI Shenanigans # Dying of Laughter."

Draw a {argument name="platform" default="Douyin"} short video cover. imagePrompts.title: Youtube Thumbnail Social Media Meme Cover

prompt: Draw a {argument name="platform" default="Douyin"} short video cover. Large title text fills the left half of the screen: "{argument name="title" default="I'm in the Emotion Factory AI creating meme images; laughing so hard colleagues called the police"}". On the right side, the host with an {argument name="expression" default="exaggerated close-up photo laughing to tears"}. In the bottom left, the number of likes is {argument name="likes" default="3.28 million"}. In the bottom right, the hashtags are "# AI Shenanigans # Dying of Laughter."
originalPrompt: Draw a {argument name="platform" default="Douyin"} short video cover. Large title text fills the left half of the screen: "{argument name="title" default="I'm in the Emotion Factory AI creating meme images; laughing so hard colleagues called the police"}". On the right side, the host with an {argument name="expression" default="exaggerated close-up photo laughing to tears"}. In the bottom left, the number of likes is {argument name="likes" default="3.28 million"}. In the bottom right, the hashtags are "# AI Shenanigans # Dying of Laughter."

promptTranslations.zh: 绘制一张{argument name="platform" default="抖音"}短视频封面。大标题文字占据屏幕左半部分：“{argument name="title" default="我在Emotion Factory AI里做梗图，笑得太大声被同事报警了"}”。右侧是主持人，表情为{argument name="expression" default="夸张的笑出眼泪的特写照片"}。左下角显示点赞数为{argument name="likes" default="328万"}。右下角标签为“# AI整活 # 笑死我了”。
promptTranslations.fr: Dessinez une couverture de courte vidéo {argument name="platform" default="Douyin"}. Un grand titre remplit la moitié gauche de l'écran : "{argument name="title" default="Je suis dans l'Emotion Factory AI en train de créer des images de mèmes ; je ris tellement fort que mes collègues ont appelé la police"}". Sur le côté droit, l'hôte avec une {argument name="expression" default="photo en gros plan exagérée riant aux larmes"}. En bas à gauche, le nombre de likes est {argument name="likes" default="3,28 millions"}. En bas à droite, les hashtags sont "# AI Shenanigans # Dying of Laughter.
promptTranslations.ru: Нарисуй обложку для короткого видео на платформе {argument name="platform" default="Douyin"}. Крупный заголовок занимает левую половину экрана: "{argument name="title" default="Я в Emotion Factory AI создаю мемы; смеюсь так сильно, что коллеги вызвали полицию"}". Справа — ведущий с {argument name="expression" default="утрированным выражением лица, смеющийся до слез на крупном плане"}. В левом нижнем углу количество лайков: {argument name="likes" default="3,28 млн"}. В правом нижнем углу хэштеги: "#AIПриколы #УмираюСоСмеху".
promptTranslations.pt: Desenhe uma capa de vídeo curto para {argument name="platform" default="Douyin"}. Um título grande preenche a metade esquerda da tela: "{argument name="title" default="Estou na Emotion Factory AI criando imagens de memes; rindo tanto que meus colegas chamaram a polícia"}". No lado direito, o apresentador com uma {argument name="expression" default="foto em close exagerado rindo até chorar"}. No canto inferior esquerdo, o número de curtidas é {argument name="likes" default="3,28 milhões"}. No canto inferior direito, as hashtags são "# Travessuras de IA # Morrendo de Rir.
promptTranslations.ja: {argument name="platform" default="Douyin"}のショート動画用カバー画像を作成してください。画面左半分を大きく占めるタイトルテキスト: "{argument name="title" default="AIの感情工場でミーム画像を作っていたら、笑いすぎて同僚に警察を呼ばれた件"}"。右側には、{argument name="expression" default="涙を流して大笑いしている誇張されたクローズアップ写真"}の投稿者。左下には「いいね！」の数として「{argument name="likes" default="328万"}」、右下にはハッシュタグ「#AIの悪ふざけ #爆笑必至」を配置してください。
promptTranslations.ko: {argument name="platform" default="Douyin"} 숏폼 영상 커버를 제작하세요. 화면 왼쪽 절반은 큰 제목 텍스트로 채웁니다: "{argument name="title" default="AI로 밈 이미지 만드는 감정 공장(Emotion Factory)에 들어갔더니, 너무 웃어서 동료들이 경찰을 불렀다"}". 오른쪽에는 {argument name="expression" default="눈물을 흘리며 과장되게 웃고 있는 클로즈업 사진"}의 호스트를 배치하세요. 왼쪽 하단에는 좋아요 수를 {argument name="likes" default="328만"}으로 표시하고, 오른쪽 하단에는 해시태그 "# AI 소동 # 웃다가 사망"을 넣으세요.
